Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Novastar Mortgage, Inc. To Designate And Produce Its Person(S) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Karen A. Braje, Esq., for defendant and moving party: MortgageIT, Inc.
Bryan M. Kreft, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Novastar Mortgage, Inc.

After hearing, Defendant MortgageIT, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Novastar Mortgage, Inc. To Designate And Produce Its Person(s) Most Knowledgeable For Deposition is Granted for limited purpose of deposition of corporate officer or Person Most Knowledgeable on topics not covered in previous document production.
Deposition to be conducted by telephone on or before June 5, 2009. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
